revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Cmbox | type = content | text = This category '''may inappropriately label persons'''. See [[Wikipedia:Categorization]] and [[WP:BLPCAT]] for advice on how to apply categorization to articles relating to people. See also the policy at [[Wikipedia:Categorizing articles about people]] regarding categorization by [[:en:Ethnicity|Ethnicity]], [[:en:Gender|Gender]], [[:en:Religion|Religion]], [[:en:Sexual orientation|sexuality]], or [[:en:Disability|Disability]]. }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{lc:{{{nocat|false}}}}}|false|{{Single namespace|category}}|<!-- Category suppressed -->}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Cmbox | type = content | text = This category '''may inappropriately label persons'''. See [[Wikipedia:Categorization]] and [[WP:BLPCAT]] for advice on how to apply categorization to articles relating to people. See also the policy at [[Wikipedia:Categorizing articles about people]] regarding categorization by [[:en:Ethnicity|Ethnicity]], [[:en:Gender|Gender]], [[:en:Religion|Religion]], [[:en:Sexual orientation|sexuality]], or [[:en:Disability|Disability]]. }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{lc:{{{nocat|false}}}}}|false|{{Single namespace|category}}|<!-- Category suppressed -->}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{Cmbox | type = content | text = This category '''may inappropriately label persons'''. See [[Wikipedia:Categorization]] and [[WP:BLPCAT]] for advice on how to apply categorization to articles relating to people. revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606946259|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Cmbox | type = content | text = This category '''may inappropriately label persons'''. See [[Wikipedia:Categorization]] and [[WP:BLPCAT]] for advice on how to apply categorization to articles relating to people. See also the policy at [[Wikipedia:Categorizing articles about people]] regarding categorization by [[:en:Ethnicity|Ethnicity]], [[:en:Gender|Gender]], [[:en:Religion|Religion]], [[:en:Sexual orientation|sexuality]], or [[:en:Disability|Disability]]. }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{lc:{{{nocat|false}}}}}|false|{{Single namespace|category}}|<!-- Category suppressed -->}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Cmbox | type = content | text = This category '''may inappropriately label persons'''. See [[Wikipedia:Categorization]] and [[WP:BLPCAT]] for advice on how to apply categorization to articles relating to people. See also the policy at [[Wikipedia:Categorizing articles about people]] regarding categorization by [[:en:Ethnicity|Ethnicity]], [[:en:Gender|Gender]], [[:en:Religion|Religion]], [[:en:Sexual orientation|sexuality]], or [[:en:Disability|Disability]]. }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{lc:{{{nocat|false}}}}}|false|{{Single namespace|category}}|}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
